body:
## Summary
- Rewrites q146 generated true/false prompts into direct SV/EN civic propositions instead of bare answer fragments.
- Tightens the bare-phrase mutation fixture to use real q146/q157/q158/q159 residual phrases, run the focused generated true/false naturalness validator, and assert exact generated offender IDs.
- Applies the localization overlay to validator-derived generated expectations before template parity, then regenerates canonical CSV and static question banks.

## Validation
- `npm run validate:content`
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern 'q146|q761|q762|political|bare answer phrases|Try to persuade|Stop others|Försöka övertyga|Hindra andra|generated true_false|sentence|static site question bank parity|derived' tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-question-sentence-endings.test.js scripts/derived-content.test.js tests/content-static-site-question-bank-parity.test.js`
- `npm run test:derived-content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] fix generated bare phrase naturalness guard
